name: Listen Mode page renders topic selection or empty state
description: A logged-in user opens /app/listen and sees the real Listen Mode feature -- the 'Listen Mode' heading and the guidance about turning notes into a study conversation -- with the interactive area rendered below (either a topic selector to choose material, OR a clear empty state prompting the user to add topics/subjects first). This is a new account, so a generated dialogue is NOT required.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to finish loading
Verify the page renders the 'Listen Mode' heading (not a 404 or blank screen) with the descriptive guidance about turning notes into a study conversation

Verify the area below the header renders real content -- either a topic selection control to pick study material OR a clear empty-state message inviting the user to add topics -- rather than an empty or broken container
